category_sources: source_facts.description says libgtop obtains process information; official/manual descriptions identify LibGTop as a library for CPU, memory, and process/system data.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libgtop; official GNOME project path uses libgtop: https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/libgtop
docs_sources: Official GNOME GitLab project is the best official documentation surface found for libgtop: https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/libgtop
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the official GNOME GitLab project: https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/libgtop
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies process information; package metadata and LibGTop manual descriptions cover CPU, memory, process, and system monitoring data.
